expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves component-stack constraints, embedding lifecycle assumptions, and integration-sensitive customer expectations
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly states the phase objective and case focus, and structures the intake around the three required focus areas: "Capture and preserve the minimum sufficient context needed to plan QA later while maintaining: - Component-stack constraints ... - Embedding lifecycle assumptions ... - Integration-sensitive customer expectations". It also enumerates required intake fields under sections 4A/4B/4C corresponding to each area.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The document is labeled and constrained to Phase 1: "NE-P1-CONTEXT-INTAKE-001 — Phase 1 (Context Intake)" and "This output is limited to context intake only and intentionally does not propose test designs or phase-2+ artifacts." It provides context intake records and gaps/checklist, consistent with phase1.
